title: Grilled Chicken Breast
description: The secret to juicy grilled chicken: even thickness, proper temp, and knowing when to stop. No more sawdust chicken.
steps: Pound chicken to even 3/4-inch thickness. This is the most important step for even cooking.
Mix salt, pepper, garlic powder, paprika, and oregano. Coat chicken with oil, then season both sides.
Let chicken sit at room temperature 15-20 minutes while grill heats.
Preheat grill to medium-high (400-450°F). Clean and oil grates.
Grill chicken 5-6 minutes per side. Don't move it - let it develop grill marks.
Check internal temp - pull at 160°F (carryover will bring it to 165°F).
Rest 5 minutes before slicing. This redistributes the juices.
notes: Pounding to even thickness is non-negotiable. Thick parts overcook while thin parts dry out.
Use an instant-read thermometer. Guessing = dry chicken.
Resting is not optional. Cut too early and all the juice runs out.
